name: shplash Repo
subtitle: IPAID and future apps
description: Source for IPAID, an on-device utility for editing IPA bundle identifiers before signing or installing.

news.title: IPAID is now available from shplash Repo
news.caption: Version 1.1.1

apps.name: IPAID
apps.subtitle: Edit IPA bundle IDs
apps.localizedDescription:
IPAID is an on-device utility for editing IPA bundle identifiers before signing or installing.

Useful for SideStore, AltStore, Feather, and LiveContainer workflows.

Supports app and extension bundle ID rewriting while keeping the original IPA untouched.
apps.versionDescription:
• Added iOS 15 support
• Improved bundle ID rewriting
• Better export handling
• Stability improvements
